summary: TGI Friday’s is eliminating busy work from their general manager’s plates, allowing them to focus on the team members, Sugarloaf Holdings Founder and CEO Ray Blanchette tells Bloomberg Intelligence. In this episode of the Choppin’ It Up podcast, Blanchette sits down with BI’s senior restaurant and foodservice analyst Michael Halen to discuss TGI Friday’s focus on four-wall execution, hospitality and food quality to boost US same-store sales. Blanchette also comments on value, international store

title: Vanguards of Healthcare: SR One’s George on Next Biotech Cycle
title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：SR One 的乔治开启下一个生物技术周期
summary: “I think this is an incredible time to be investing in biotech,” says Dr. Simeon George, founder and CEO of SR One, who joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Sam Fazeli to discuss why biotech’s next cycle will be global, selective and unforgiving. George traces SR One’s evolution from one of pharma’s oldest corporate venture arms to an independent firm with more than $2 billion raised. The conversation explores why AI’s real test is cutting development time and attrition, not just discovering tar

A new wave of reforms is opening the door to greater private investment in clean power, storage and grid infrastructure after years of subdued activity, creating one of the region’s largest energy transition opportunities. The shift comes against a complex geopolitical backdrop. As negotiations over the US-Mexico-Canada Agreement continue, Mexico is balancing its deep integration with North American supply chains against a desire to dive

summary: Gold declined as escalating tensions in the Middle East rekindled expectations that the Federal Reserve may need to hike interest rates to contain stubborn inflation.

title_cn: 伊朗担忧导致石油和美元飙升，新兴货币下跌
summary: Most developing-world currencies fell Thursday as renewed worries about tensions in the Middle East lifted oil prices in another risk-off session in global markets.

title: Faena Condo Project Sells $30 Million Penthouse on Miami River
title_cn: Faena 公寓项目在迈阿密河上出售价值 3000 万美元的顶层公寓
summary: Argentine fashion entrepreneur-turned-developer Alan Faena sold a $30 million penthouse in his planned twin condo towers on the Miami River, a milestone in the mission to take his maximalist, theatrical brand worldwide.

title: Jump Trading Doubles Team to Ride Record Prediction Market Boom

summary: As prediction markets draw record trading around events like the World Cup, Jump Trading Group is betting the once-niche contracts are becoming a lasting corner of Wall Street.

title: Citigroup Sees Bondholders Recover 50% of Senegal’s Debt Under Revamp
title_cn: 花旗集团预计债券持有人可通过重组收回塞内加尔 50% 的债务
summary: Holders of Senegal’s dollar bonds could end up recouping less than 50% of the face value of the securities in the event of a restructuring — below the prices at which the debt currently trades, according to Citigroup Inc.

title: Canada’s Forgotten Shale Gas Play Reemerges as Oil Hot Spot
title_cn: 加拿大被遗忘的页岩气开采重新成为石油热点
summary: On the edge of the Canadian Rocky Mountains, companies including Obsidian Energy Ltd. and Yangarra Resources Corp. are breathing new life into a long-dormant gas reservoir — except now they’re drilling for oil.

title: German Chemical Industry in Crisis Despite Reprieve, Lobby Says
title_cn: 游说团体称，德国化学工业尽管得到了缓解，但仍处于危机之中
summary: Germany’s chemical industry remains in a structural crisis despite a brief breather when the conflict in the Middle East triggered stockpiling and hit rivals in Asia harder, according to the industry’s VCI association.

title: Abbott Laboratories Surges on 2026 Profit Guidance Raise
title_cn: 雅培公司 (Abbott Laboratories) 上调 2026 年利润指引，股价飙升
summary: Abbott Laboratories soared the most in 24 years after raising its 2026 profit guidance following a stronger-than-expected second quarter driven by improved performance across most of its business lines.

title: Raiffeisen Clears Key Hurdle in €517 Million Bid for Addiko Bank
title_cn: Raiffeisen 以 5.17 亿欧元收购 Addiko 银行，扫清了关键障碍
summary: Raiffeisen Bank International AG reached a key milestone in its bid to acquire Addiko Bank AG after shareholders representing more than 55% tendered their shares, reaching the offer’s minimum threshold.

title_cn: 随着预测市场威胁的增加，博彩债券失去了吸引力

title_cn: 7 月 16 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil resumed gains as concerns mount about disruptions to flows from the Middle East, with the US continuing to strike Iran.

title: Multistrat Hedge Fund Paloma to Cut Teams in Latest Pivot
title_cn: Multistrat 对冲基金 Paloma 将在最新转型中裁员
summary: Donald Sussman, the veteran behind Paloma Partners, is pivoting his long-standing multistrategy hedge fund to focus on fewer managers in which he has the highest conviction as the firm adjusts to a decline in assets over the past three years.

title: SMBC Bolsters Global Sales and Trading Push With Macro Hire
title_cn: SMBC 通过宏观招聘推动全球销售和交易
summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corp. hired Kunal Maini as international head of macro rates, bolstering efforts to expand its sales and trading franchise beyond its core Japanese market.

title: US Drivers Are Again Paying More Than $5 a Gallon for Diesel
title_cn: 美国司机再次支付每加仑超过 5 美元的柴油
summary: American drivers are once again paying more than $5 a gallon for diesel, with a fresh round of hostilities in the Middle East raising the specter of more war-induced inflation.

title: US Stock Futures Today: AtaiBeckley, GE Aerospace, UnitedHealth
title_cn: 今日美国股票期货：AtaiBeckley、GE Aerospace、UnitedHealth
summary: S&P 500 Index futures are down 0.2% as of 7:47 a.m. in New York. The US intensified strikes against Iran, hitting an oil tanker near the country’s main export terminal for the first time since the restart of the blockade on the Islamic Republic’s ports.

title: Sea Drone Maker Saronic to Build New Shipyard in South Texas
title_cn: 海上无人机制造商 Saronic 将在德克萨斯州南部建造新造船厂
summary: An Austin-based technology startup whose maritime drones were used by the US military in combat for the first time this week plans to build a $3.2 billion shipyard in South Texas.

title: US Stocks Tumble as TSMC Results Revive AI Spending Concerns
title_cn: 台积电业绩重燃人工智能支出担忧，美股暴跌
summary: US stocks declined on Thursday as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s results failed to boost artificial-intelligence stocks and traders assessed a worsening situation in the Middle East.

title: Apple Nears Launch of OLED iPad Mini; New iPad Air and Base iPad in 2027
title_cn: 苹果即将推出 OLED iPad Mini； 2027 年新款 iPad Air 和 Base iPad
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce its biggest overhaul to the iPad mini in half a decade, giving new life to a product that’s popular with travelers and technology enthusiasts.

title: Uber Agrees to Buy Delivery Hero in $14.8 Billion Deal
title_cn: Uber 同意以 148 亿美元收购 Delivery Hero
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to buy Delivery Hero SE in a deal that values the German food-delivery company at $14.8 billion and expands the US firm’s global operations.

title: Travel Agency Platform Fora Valued at $1 Billion in New Funding
title_cn: 旅行社平台 Fora 新融资估值达 10 亿美元
summary: Fora, an online platform for travel agents, has raised $60 million in funding at a $1 billion valuation, with the goal of adding artificial intelligence tools to help travel advisers accelerate their businesses.

title: Hollywood Sci-Fi Lot Pitched as Site to Make Real Space-Age Weapons
title_cn: 好莱坞科幻片被定位为制造真正太空时代武器的场地
summary: Manhattan Beach Studios has been the site of filming for projects including Stars Wars: The Mandalorian, a TV series about a heavily armed bounty hunter in a galaxy far, far away.

title: Digi Spanish Unit’s Shares Climb 7% After €287 Million IPO
title_cn: Digi 西班牙子公司 2.87 亿欧元 IPO 后股价上涨 7%
summary: Digi Spain Telecom SA shares opened higher in their debut in Spain on Thursday, completing a rare initial public offering in the country.

title: Google Must Give Gemini Rivals Equal Access to Android System, EU Says
title_cn: 欧盟称谷歌必须给予 Gemini 竞争对手平等的 Android 系统访问权限
summary: Google faces a European Union directive to open up its Android operating system to artificial intelligence rivals for certain features and give search data to competing online engine providers.

title: Franklin Templeton Cuts AI Bets, Favors Chinese Internet Stocks
title_cn: 富兰克林邓普顿削减人工智能押注，青睐中国互联网股票
summary: Franklin Templeton’s main emerging equity fund has scaled back on memory chipmakers’ shares after their huge rally, instead favoring Chinese internet names such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd and Tencent Holdings Ltd.

title: CXMT’s Blockbuster IPO 212 Times Covered for Retail Investors
title_cn: 长鑫存储重磅IPO 212次覆盖散户投资者
summary: The marquee listing of CXMT Corp. ignited a rush among retail investors as China’s homegrown memory giant opened books for an initial public offering to raise $9.8 billion, the second-largest in the nation’s history.

title: Japan to Buy Nvidia Rubin Chips to Build an AI for Robots
title_cn: 日本将购买 Nvidia Rubin 芯片来构建机器人人工智能
summary: Japan is planning to buy 27,500 next-generation Rubin chips from Nvidia Corp. to build a homegrown foundational AI model for robots.

title: AI Sales Start to Justify Data Center Spending: Report
title_cn: 人工智能销售开始证明数据中心支出的合理性：报告
summary: Revenue from artificial intelligence has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View.

title: AI Companion Bots and Virtual Lovers Face China Crackdown
title_cn: 人工智能伴侣机器人和虚拟恋人面临中国打压
summary: Beijing is shunning virtual lovers, which had grown into a popular social substitute

title: Vital Signals Announces $399 Signal Ring That Gives Blood Pressure Readings
title_cn: Vital Signals 推出售价 399 美元的信号环，可提供血压读数
summary: A three-year-old startup says it has produced a smart ring that can track blood pressure as accurately as a traditional arm cuff and that — eventually — it could be able to make medical diagnoses. If the company, called Vital Signals, can successfully deliver on the promise, it would represent a significant breakthrough in consumer wearables.

title: China Sends Robots Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
title_cn: 中国将机器人送到世界各地学习如何做人
summary: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.

title: AI Needs Radiologists as Much as Radiologists Need AI
title_cn: 人工智能需要放射科医生，就像放射科医生需要人工智能一样
summary: AI can make mistakes, and that’s a red line in healthcare.

title: Messi Defending World Cup Title Would Boost US Sportsbooks Too
title_cn: 梅西卫冕世界杯冠军也将提振美国体育博彩
summary: If Lionel Messi leads Argentina to an upset victory against Spain in its World Cup title defense this weekend, it will cap a profitable final stretch of games for US betting firms.

title: Atlas Copco Orders Soar on Momentum in Chipmaking-Exposed Unit
title_cn: 阿特拉斯·科普柯芯片制造业务部门的势头强劲，订单猛增
summary: Atlas Copco AB’s orders blew past expectations on growing momentum at its chipmaking-exposed business, cementing the Swedish industrial company’s spot as a key beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom.

title: ASML Mulls Price Hike for Chipmaking Tools, Information Says
title_cn: 消息称 ASML 正在考虑提高芯片制造工具的价格
summary: ASML Holding NV plans to raise prices for its chipmaking equipment, setting up a potential clash with its biggest customer Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., according to a report in the Information citing people familiar with the matter.

title: Baidu to Upgrade Hong Kong Listing Status to Attract Capital
title_cn: 百度提升香港上市地位以吸引资本
summary: Baidu Inc. plans to pursue a dual primary listing in the US and Hong Kong, a move that will allow it to tap mainland Chinese investors.

title: US 25% Tariffs on Brazil Risk Becoming an Election Gift to Lula
title_cn: 美国对巴西征收 25% 关税有可能成为送给卢拉的选举礼物
summary: The US decision to impose 25% tariffs on Brazil has reignited a trade dispute with President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s government just months before October’s presidential election, potentially shaping the outcome of a deeply polarized race.

title: Iraq Says Basrah Oil Loadings Continue After Tanker Incident
title_cn: 伊拉克称油轮事件后巴士拉石油装载仍在继续
summary: Iraq said it continues to load oil onto tankers at its Basrah export installations in the Persian Gulf and that no damage had been sustained to a vessel while it loaded there.

title: Mahmood’s Economic ‘Blank Slate’ Key to Appeal as UK Chancellor
title_cn: 马哈茂德的经济“空白”成为英国财政大臣上诉的关键
summary: UK Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood’s edge over Energy Secretary Ed Miliband in the race to be appointed Andy Burnham’s Chancellor of the Exchequer appears to lie in one important quality: economically, she’s a blank slate.

title: Reid Hoffman Pumps $10 Million Into Talarico’s Senate Bid
title_cn: 里德·霍夫曼 (Reid Hoffman) 斥资 1000 万美元参与塔拉里科 (Talarico) 参议员竞选

title: UK Aims to Send Ukraine Pared-Down Ballistic Missile in 2027
title_cn: 英国计划于 2027 年向乌克兰发射精简型弹道导弹
summary: The UK has signed contracts with multiple companies to develop the country’s first ballistic missile in more than half a century in a bid to both support Ukraine and reduce Europe’s reliance on American weaponry.

title: India Court Voids Visa Services Tenders in Australia, Singapore
title_cn: 印度法院撤销澳大利亚和新加坡的签证服务招标
summary: An Indian court has scrapped the government’s tender for outsourcing passport, visa and consular services at diplomatic missions in four countries, including Australia and Singapore, as two losing bidders argued the selection process wasn’t fair.

title: Deadly ICE Shooting Jolts an Already Chaotic Maine Senate Race
title_cn: 致命的 ICE 枪击事件扰乱了本已混乱的缅因州参议院竞选
summary: The Maine Senate race has been jolted yet again after the fatal shooting of a Colombian man by a federal agent this week, galvanizing Democrats against President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown.

title: Dario Amodei, Anthropic Employees Give Millions to Regulate AI
title_cn: Dario Amodei，Anthropic 员工捐赠数百万美元来监管人工智能
summary: Anthropic PBC Chief Executive Officer Dario Amodei and five other employees of the company gave more than $2 million to a super political action committee focused on regulating artificial intelligence, boosting the AI safety movement’s war chest in this year’s midterm elections.

title: Meloni Wins Lower House Backing for Electoral Reform Bill
title_cn: 梅洛尼赢得下议院对选举改革法案的支持
summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni overcame government infighting to win lower house approval for an Italian electoral-reform bill that has been one of her top legislative priorities.

title: UK Urges FIFA to Investigate Argentina’s Falklands Banner
title_cn: 英国敦促国际足联调查阿根廷福克兰群岛旗帜
summary: The UK government has called on football’s governing body FIFA to investigate whether the Argentinian team breached its rules by waving a banner in support of their country’s claim to the Falkland Islands after defeating England in the World Cup semi-finals.

title: Finnish Premier Asks Parliament to Convene as Scandal Flares Up
title_cn: 丑闻爆发，芬兰总理要求议会召开会议
summary: Finland’s Prime Minister Petteri Orpo asked the speaker of parliament to reconvene the Nordic nation’s legislature in the middle of its summer break as a simmering political crisis flared up.

title: Maine, Texas ICE Shootings Add to GOP Midterm Pressures
title_cn: 缅因州和德克萨斯州 ICE 枪击事件增加了共和党中期压力
summary: The agency is again dominating headlines in two states hosting critical Senate races.

title: Ukrainians Protest Zelenskyy’s Ouster of Defense Minister
title_cn: 乌克兰民众抗议泽连斯基罢免国防部长
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s abrupt dismissal of the popular defense minister, Mykhailo Fedorov, triggered protests across the country and dismay among foreign allies.

title: Iran-US Hostilities Worsen as Hormuz Shipping Traffic Falls
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡航运量下降，伊朗与美国的敌对行动加剧
summary: The US intensified strikes against Iran, hitting an oil tanker near the country’s main export terminal for the first time since the restart of the blockade on the Islamic Republic’s ports.

title: Xi Scores a Soft-Power Win Over Trump as Pew Survey Shows China Gain on US
title_cn: 皮尤调查显示中国领先美国，习近平软实力战胜特朗普
summary: Pew survey shows people view China more positively than the US for the first time in almost 20 years.

title: Ukraine Hit Two Large Russia-Linked Oil Tankers in Black Sea
title_cn: 乌克兰在黑海击中两艘与俄罗斯有关的大型油轮
summary: Ukrainian naval drones hit two large Russia-linked oil tankers in the Black Sea as Moscow and Kyiv expand the scope of their mutual maritime strikes.

title: Merz Is Inching Germany Toward Backing EU Push Against China
title_cn: 默茨正在推动德国支持欧盟针对中国的行动
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz is finally showing some openness to backing the European Union’s push against China.

title: Zelenskyy Picks Energy CEO for Premier as Kyiv Eyes Winter
title_cn: 基辅迎来冬季，泽连斯基任命能源首席执行官为总理
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy named the head of a state-run energy company as Ukraine’s next prime minister, underscoring his focus on preparing for the coming winter under the threat of Russian attacks.

title: Iran’s Top Negotiator Defends US Peace Talks Against Hardliners
title_cn: 伊朗最高谈判代表捍卫美国针对强硬派的和平谈判
summary: Iran’s lead negotiator defended diplomatic efforts to end the war, pushing back against hardliners urging him to abandon a tentative peace deal and avenge the country’s slain supreme leader.

title: EU Top Court Backs Amnesty for Catalan Independence Leaders
title_cn: 欧盟最高法院支持对加泰罗尼亚独立领导人的特赦
summary: The European Union’s top court ruled in favor of a Spanish law granting amnesty to Catalan politicians who held a referendum for the region’s independence in 2017, handing Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez a political boost.
